title: Warden to Snorlax
description: Changes the Warden into our favourite Pokémon!
body:
![Warden to Snorlax](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VQegE48D/images/81e0f54e5639ea09b20868598789575eb49f0b6e.png 'Pack logo!')

# Warden to Snorlax
## Changes your favourite mob into your favourite pokémon! 

Are you a fan of Pokémon? Ever wanted to fight a Snorlax in a cave?
Yeahh- me neither, but this one certainly adds it! This pack changes the Warden into the glorious Snorlax! One fat and sleepy boie has been in a pokeball for way too long, and finally escaped, hunting down the players for revenge. Every. Single. One of them.

This pack changes the Warden into a Snorlax, and it's spawn egg into a pokéball!

![Warden to Snorlax](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VQegE48D/images/b558b0b32f1fa355f0257a40807d1c518bb21178.png 'What it does')
